name: Press Ventures, Inc.
summary: Press Ventures, Inc. owns rights to the cedar leaf oil diffusion (CLO-D) technology in Poland. The patented CLO-D technology converts the cedar leaf oil into a vapor, and enables the diffusion of vapors for the killing of bacteria, mold, and viruses, such as Anthrax and the H1N1 virus in buildings. It focuses to distribute its products through a network of air conditioning installation companies. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Warsaw, Poland.
